documents.title: Complaint
documents.text: Plaintiff alleges employment discrimination and retaliation by a private employer.

documents.title: Relief Requested
documents.text: Plaintiff seeks compensatory damages and injunctive relief.

documents.title: Civil Rights Filing
documents.text: Several individuals bring claims under federal civil rights law related to police conduct.

documents.title: Petition
documents.text: A nonprofit organization challenges a state agency policy and seeks declaratory relief.
